summary: Stores and emits a signed integer control payload.
description: Use Int for discrete numeric controls such as counts, selected indices, and integer mode values.
runtimeBehavior: in is the hot control.message.any inlet: typed payloads update and emit, bang emits the stored integer payload, and set ... updates silently. cold updates silently.

ports.description: Hot inlet: typed integer payloads update and emit; bang emits the stored payload; set ... updates silently.
Cold inlet: compatible integer payloads update without emitting.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Trigger an integer value
example.description: Use bang to re-emit the current integer after a set event updates it silently.
